description: A FOIA complaint case titled 'FOIA-2024-00847 - Public Records Request for Environmental Inspection Reports' is open in ArkCase. Record three cost entries for this case: 'Document search and retrieval - 4.5 hours' for $450.00 dated 2025-01-15; 'Legal review of responsive documents - 12.5 hours' for $1250.00 dated 2025-01-22; and 'Redaction and duplication processing' for $325.00 dated 2025-01-28. Save a summary report to ~/Documents/cost_tracking_report.txt containing the case ID, each entry's description and amount, and the total processing cost.
